title: [FIRRTL] when (core dump)
body:
The following FIRRTL program

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    input clock: Clock
    input reset: UInt<1>
    input arst: AsyncReset
    input inp_ab: SInt<7>[3]
    output fsm_22_next: UInt<2>
    reg fsm_22_state: UInt<2>, clock with: (reset => (arst, UInt<2>(0)))
    when eq(fsm_22_state, UInt<2>(0)) :
      when xorr(inp_ab[1]) :
        fsm_22_next <= UInt<2>(1)
      else :
        fsm_22_next <= fsm_22_state
    else :
      fsm_22_next <= fsm_22_state
    fsm_22_state <= fsm_22_next
```

Compiled with `firtool --lower-to-rtl --lower-types --expand-whens --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --pass-timing --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v` produces this error:

```bash
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://bugs.llvm.org/ and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.      Program arguments: ../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-rtl --lower-types --expand-whens --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --pass-timing --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v
1.       #0 0x000000000043d06d llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x43d06d)
 #1 0x000000000043aec4 llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x43aec4)
 #2 0x000000000043b023 SignalHandler(int) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x43b023)
 #3 0x00007f1ffa2c5a30 __restore_rt (/lib64/libpthread.so.0+0x13a30)
 #4 0x0000000000570386 mlir::Type::getDialect() const (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x570386)
 #5 0x0000000000599d09 circt::firrtl::__mlir_ods_local_type_constraint_FIRRTL12(mlir::Operation*, mlir::Type, llvm::StringRef, unsigned int) /home/drom/work/github/llvm/circt/build/include/circt/Dialect/FIRRTL/FIRRTL.cpp.inc:141:3
 #6 0x00000000005b4124 circt::firrtl::SubindexOp::verify() /home/drom/work/github/llvm/circt/build/include/circt/Dialect/FIRRTL/FIRRTL.cpp.inc:12990:7
 #7 0x0000000000580d4f mlir::Op<circt::firrtl::SubindexOp, mlir::OpTrait::ZeroRegion, mlir::OpTrait::OneResult, mlir::OpTrait::OneTypedResult<circt::firrtl::FIRRTLType>::Impl, mlir::OpTrait::ZeroSuccessor, mlir::OpTrait::OneOperand, mlir::MemoryEffectOpInterface::Trait>::verifyInvariants(mlir::Operation*) /home/drom/work/github/llvm/circt/build/../llvm/mlir/include/mlir/IR/OpDefinition.h:1775:3
 #8 0x0000000000572163 (anonymous namespace)::OperationVerifier::verifyOperation(mlir::Operation&) (.isra.0) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x572163)
 #9 0x0000000000572a95 (anonymous namespace)::OperationVerifier::verifyOperation(mlir::Operation&) (.isra.0) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x572a95)
#10 0x0000000000572a95 (anonymous namespace)::OperationVerifier::verifyOperation(mlir::Operation&) (.isra.0) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x572a95)
#11 0x0000000000572d13 (anonymous namespace)::OperationVerifier::verifyOperation(mlir::Operation&) (.isra.0) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x572d13)
#12 0x00000000005738f2 mlir::verify(mlir::Operation*) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x5738f2)
#13 0x00000000006a60da mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::run(mlir::Pass*, mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x6a60da)
#14 0x00000000006a62b0 mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::runPipeline(llvm::iterator_range<llvm::pointee_iterator<std::unique_ptr<mlir::Pass, std::default_delete<mlir::Pass> >*, mlir::Pass> >, mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int, mlir::PassInstrumentor*, mlir::PassInstrumentation::PipelineParentInfo const*) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x6a62b0)
#15 0x00000000006a56d2 mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::runOnOperationAsyncImpl(bool) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x6a56d2)
#16 0x00000000006a5f16 mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::run(mlir::Pass*, mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x6a5f16)
#17 0x00000000006a62b0 mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::runPipeline(llvm::iterator_range<llvm::pointee_iterator<std::unique_ptr<mlir::Pass, std::default_delete<mlir::Pass> >*, mlir::Pass> >, mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int, mlir::PassInstrumentor*, mlir::PassInstrumentation::PipelineParentInfo const*) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x6a62b0)
#18 0x00000000006a9377 mlir::PassManager::run(mlir::Operation*) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x6a9377)
#19 0x000000000040c105 processBuffer(std::unique_ptr<llvm::MemoryBuffer, std::default_delete<llvm::MemoryBuffer> >, llvm::StringRef, std::function<mlir::LogicalResult (mlir::OwningModuleRef)>) /home/drom/work/github/llvm/circt/build/../tools/firtool/firtool.cpp:230:3
#20 0x00000000004082af processBufferIntoSingleStream /home/drom/work/github/llvm/circt/build/../tools/firtool/firtool.cpp:255:8
#21 0x00000000004082af main /home/drom/work/github/llvm/circt/build/../tools/firtool/firtool.cpp:323:15
#22 0x00007f1ff9d33b25 __libc_start_main (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x27b25)
#23 0x0000000000409c9e _start /home/abuild/rpmbuild/BUILD/glibc-2.33/csu/../sysdeps/x86_64/start.S:122:0
./process1.sh: line 16: 31453 Segmentation fault      (core dumped) ../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-rtl --lower-types --expand-whens --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --pass-timing --verilog -o=$VFILE2
```

Compiled with `firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT --dont-fold div` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  input        clock,
  input        reset,
  input        arst,
  input  [6:0] inp_ab_0,
  input  [6:0] inp_ab_1,
  input  [6:0] inp_ab_2,
  output [1:0] fsm_22_next
);
  reg [1:0] fsm_22_state;
  wire [1:0] _GEN_0 = ^inp_ab_1 ? 2'h1 : fsm_22_state; // @[]
  assign fsm_22_next = fsm_22_state == 2'h0 ? _GEN_0 : fsm_22_state; // @[]
  always @(posedge clock or posedge arst) begin
    if (arst) begin
      fsm_22_state <= 2'h0;
    end else begin
      fsm_22_state <= fsm_22_next;
    end
  end
...
endmodule
```
